title: taraxacum simpliciusculum
intro: Taraxacum simpliciusculum, also known as the small dandelion or woodland dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and its use in treating digestive issues, such as constipation and bloating. The health benefits of Taraxacum simpliciusculum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve liver function. Taraxacum simpliciusculum is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it can also be used in capsule or powder form to extract its medicinal properties.
